product_information.description: Deze zachte peeling/ lysing crème poetst dode huidcellen en onzuiverheden weg. Helpt rimpeltjes en pigmentvlekjes verminderen. Kostbare biologische Castor olie en Jojoba olie verzorgen en hydrateren de huid op natuurlijke wijze. Voor een zachte, gladde en zuivere huid.

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: Aqua (Water), Ricinus Communis Seed Oil**, Cetearyl Alcohol, Prunus Armeniaca Seed Powder, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil**, Linum Usitatissimum Seed Oil**, Sodium Cetearyl Sulfate, Lanolin, Cetyl Palmitate, Parfum (Fragrance), Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Levulinic Acid, P-Anisic Acid, Tocopherol, Sodium Levulinate, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Alcohol, Lactic Acid, Leptospermum Scoparium Branch/Leaf Oil, Phytic Acid, Disodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Citrus Reticulata Peel Oil, Cymbopogon Schoenanthus Oil, Salix Alba Bark Extract**, Xanthan Gum, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Maris Sal, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate, Daucus Carota Sativa Root Extract**,Lavandula Hybrida Grosso Herb Oil, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Citral*, Citronellol*, Limonene*, Linalool*.* from natural essential oils**. from controlled organic agriculture.
